name: Pumpkin Chess Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 teaspoons Martha White Self-Rising Corn Meal Mix
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
Cream sugar and butter together in a mixing bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add remaining ingredients except crust and whipped cream; beat until well blended.
Pour filling into pastry shell.
Bake for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a knife inserted one inch from the center comes out clean. Do not overbake. The pie will continue to set as it cools.
Cool on a wire rack. This pie is good served chilled and topped with whipped cream.
